candidates.why: Separate operating D&A row above operating profit, but there is no selected COGS reference bucket and no visible COGS/cost-of-sales structure indicating this belongs to COGS.
Separate operating D&A row above operating profit, but no selected COGS bucket exists and the statement does not show a direct-cost/COGS section to anchor this to COGS.
Separate operating D&A row above operating profit, but no selected COGS bucket exists and nothing indicates this is specifically COGS-related.

variables.notes: No COGS rows were selected in the earlier PROF mapping, and the visible operating structure is overhead-based rather than cost-of-sales based. Therefore no COGS-related D&A row should be added separately.

candidates.why: Explicit operating amortization line presented separately at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows ('Other external expenses' and 'Personnel expenses'), so it appears outside those selected rows and should be added separately.
Explicit operating amortization line above operating profit and separate from the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in those rows.
Explicit operating depreciation line above operating profit and separate from the selected XSGA component rows, indicating it sits alongside rather than inside the selected XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of 'Other external expenses' and 'Personnel expenses'. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines above operating profit, not subcomponents nested under those selected rows. No higher-level D&A summary row is present, so the separate component rows should be added.
